description_long: This object consists of two large, red-and-clear capsules, one of which is split open to reveal a collection of multicolored spherical pills inside. The capsules have a glossy red top half and a translucent lower half, allowing the contents to be partially visible. The interior is filled with small, round beads in various colors such as white, blue, and orange, mimicking the appearance of a multi-compartment medicine. The capsules are placed on a flat, dark surface, and some of the beads have spilled out, emphasizing the object's function as a container for oral medication. The overall design is clean and modern, with smooth, hard surfaces and a pharmaceutical aesthetic. No visible branding or text is present on the capsules.
description: A pair of large, glossy red-and-clear capsules filled with multicolored spherical pills, one of which is open and spilling its contents.
description_view_0: Two capsules are visible, one open and spilling multicolored beads, with the interior contents clearly displayed.
description_view_1: The capsule stands upright with the red cap facing forward, showing the translucent lower half filled with beads.
description_view_2: The open capsule lies on its side, with beads spilling out onto the surface, and the upright capsule is seen from the side.
description_view_3: The view is aligned with the ends of the capsules, showing the circular red caps and a few beads in front.
